text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction * Immigrants 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Immigrants Refugees/Entrants/Asylees Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF USAHELLO Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support for integration by providing online resources and information about United States culture, daily life, education, health, jobs, laws, and further immigration explainers. Also offers online citizenship courses, GED test preparation courses, and a database of local services. Eligibility: Individuals who are refugees or immigrants Hours: Not applicable Email Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
